_comment: PROPOSED permission allowlist for the autonomous dev loop. This is a REFERENCE file, NOT active config. To use it, Chris copies the 'permissions' object into .claude/settings.json himself. The allow list covers exactly what dev-loop.md needs (build/lint/test, git on branches, gh for issues/PRs). The deny list blocks destructive git, pushing to main, and reading secret files. acceptEdits mode (see run-dev-loop.ps1) relies on this allowlist to keep dangerous commands gated.
